title: Itanagar、Arunachal Pradesh — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Itanagar、Arunachal Pradesh的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Itanagar是Arunachal Pradesh的一个城市，人口约60,000。The capital of Arunachal Pradesh, a scenic city in the Himalayan foothills known for its tribal culture and ancient Ita Fort.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
